intents.axiomatic: Documentation is a dynamic knowledge graph where identity is decoupled from physical location.
intents.axiological: Frictionless discovery and zero-maintenance resilience are the primary metrics of system value.
intents.teleological: To establish a self-organizing educational ecosystem that scales automatically with content growth.

phases.title: Infrastructure & FSD Scaffolding
phases.description: Establish the modular directory structure within the documentation feature slice.

steps.check: Verify directory existence and empty index exports.

phases.title: The Axiological Registry (Data Layer)
phases.description: Implement the path-independent concept registry using Vite's dynamic discovery.

steps.check: Console log the generated Knowledge Map to verify all .md files are detected.

subtasks: Create a Map of Slug -> Metadata
steps.check: Unit test: Move a file and verify the Registry updates the path correctly on reload.

phases.title: The Semantic Parser (Logic Layer)
phases.description: Create the procedural linker that identifies terms and injects smart components.

steps.check: Verify that 'Cthic Field' in a document is successfully identified and flagged for component injection.

subtasks: Extract first 150 chars of target docs for tooltips
Strip markdown syntax for clean previews
steps.check: Verify tooltip content is concise and readable.

phases.title: The Manifold Tooltip (UI Layer)
phases.description: Build the high-fidelity, interactive tooltip components.

steps.check: Visual check: Ensure the cyan border and aura pulse match the simulation's aesthetic.
Verify that clicking 'Read More' triggers a navigation intent.

phases.title: Decoupled Navigation & Event Bus
phases.description: Establish the event-driven routing system for path-independent traversal.

steps.check: Verify that a tooltip click updates the top-level DocumentationViewer state without direct props.
Verify the user can successfully traverse back through their discovery path.

phases.title: Heuristics & Self-Healing
phases.description: Automate alias generation and implement error resilience.

steps.check: Verify that 'Cthic Fields' (plural) correctly links to the 'Cthic Field' document.
Delete a file and verify that links to it revert to plain text without crashing.

phases.title: Integration & Final Validation
phases.description: Apply the system to the existing documentation and verify the full discovery loop.

steps.check: Full loop check: Hover -> Tooltip -> Click -> Navigate.

subtasks: Check scan times for large doc sets
steps.check: Ensure UI remains responsive during Knowledge Map generation.

periodic_checks: Check 1: Registry Integrity - Run after any file move/rename.
Check 2: Semantic Accuracy - Verify aliases match intended concepts.
Check 3: Event Stability - Ensure navigation events don't leak or double-trigger.
Check 4: Visual Consistency - Ensure tooltips maintain the 'Cthic' aesthetic across all documents.
